outcome_contract.why: Finished self-improving work can already close with verified measurement in queue completion, but lp-do-build still has no canonical place to put that proof, so most completed self-evolving work matures without observed evidence and promotion keeps stalling.
outcome_contract.intended_outcome_statement: Finished self-evolving builds can carry a canonical verified-measurement block in build-record.user.md, and queue-state completion automatically converts that block into verified self-evolving outcome closure.

engineering_coverage.current_or_option_state: Build workflow already has a completion path and failure policy in the skill contract
engineering_coverage.gap_or_implication: Declared proof may silently disappear if the build artifact contract stays implicit
engineering_coverage.carry_forward_or_notes: Choose a fail-closed rule for malformed declared proof only

engineering_coverage.current_or_option_state: No new credential or privacy surface
Queue completion already emits lifecycle events and verified observations
engineering_coverage.gap_or_implication: Build workflow provides no explicit build-side proof contract to audit against
engineering_coverage.carry_forward_or_notes: The build artifact must become the canonical audit seam

engineering_coverage.current_or_option_state: Queue completion has focused regression coverage
engineering_coverage.gap_or_implication: No tests assert auto-extraction from build outputs
engineering_coverage.carry_forward_or_notes: Add focused completion tests for valid and malformed proof blocks

engineering_coverage.gap_or_implication: Build-record contract does not expose a matching section
engineering_coverage.carry_forward_or_notes: Add a canonical build-record section and document it

engineering_coverage.current_or_option_state: Queue completion is a small file read/write path
engineering_coverage.gap_or_implication: Parsing must not fail unrelated builds or historical records
engineering_coverage.carry_forward_or_notes: Missing section should stay fail-open; malformed declared section should fail closed

engineering_coverage.gap_or_implication: A broken parser could block queue completion on all builds
engineering_coverage.carry_forward_or_notes: Limit parsing to the optional section and preserve current behavior when absent

stage_payload.scope_summary: The self-evolving runtime already knows how to record verified measurements when `lp-do-ideas` queue completion receives structured `selfEvolvingMeasurement` input. The missing seam is earlier: `lp-do-build` has no canonical build artifact section that carries that proof, and the queue completion CLI does not auto-read it from build outputs. This fact-find scopes the proof-closing gap at the build-output boundary, not the broader self-evolving policy stack.
goals: Verify whether verified measurement closure is already implemented downstream of build completion.
Identify the narrowest canonical surface where build outputs should carry self-evolving proof.
Choose a closure path that improves proof write-back without introducing a parallel artifact format or manual CLI burden.
non_goals: Reworking self-evolving scoring, promotion-gate math, or policy journaling.
Designing a full new proving runtime before the build boundary is closed.
Backfilling historical builds with invented measurements.
constraints: Existing queue completion and self-evolving outcome closure contracts must remain additive.
The fix must preserve current pending-maturity behavior when no verified measurement exists.
Local Jest remains out of scope.
assumptions: The correct seam is build-output contract plus automatic extraction, not manual flag passing.
A malformed declared proof block should fail closed rather than silently writing corrupted evidence.
key_entry_points: `.claude/skills/lp-do-build/SKILL.md` - current build completion workflow and queue-state completion hook
`docs/plans/_templates/build-record.user.md` - canonical build output template consumed at plan completion

process_topology.trigger: a self-evolving candidate routes into the canonical `lp-do-ideas -> lp-do-fact-find -> lp-do-analysis -> lp-do-plan -> lp-do-build` workflow and the build reaches queue completion.
process_topology.end_condition: the build either closes with verified measurement in self-evolving memory or remains pending/missing proof.

areas.label: Build completion
areas.flow: `lp-do-build` writes `build-record.user.md`, archives the plan, then runs `startup-loop:queue-state-complete` with feature slug, plan path, and one-line outcome text
areas.issues: The completion CLI accepts verified measurement input in code but the workflow gives it no canonical source.

areas.label: Self-evolving proof closure
areas.flow: `markDispatchesCompleted()` can stamp `completed_by.self_evolving`, write verified observations, and emit `outcome_recorded` lifecycle events when `selfEvolvingMeasurement` exists
areas.issues: Most builds never supply that payload, so outcomes stay pending or become missing/censored.

areas.label: Promotion gate
areas.flow: Promotion gate requires observed evaluation, verified observations, and complete target KPI fields before promote/revert decisions can move past hold
areas.owners: self-evolving promotion gate and evaluation dataset
areas.issues: `analytics-v1` still has no experiment hook and proof-bearing containers with hooks still starve because completed work does not feed canonical measurement proof back in.
